violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. All RICFSM have expired. Establishment is to renew/re-apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils both ice machines and can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was moved to 3-bay sink and both ice machines were turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use either ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

Prep unit #3 was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. All food in unit was observed between 43-44DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food in unit was moved to properly functioning refrigeration at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

Rice, chicken, cheese, meatballs was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
Stuffies were observed being held past the date of disposition. Stuffies were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The floor in front of the walk-in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The floor in the basement area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
Shellfish tags must be dated when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (lettuce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024
Dishwasher rinse sink was not in good repair, observed leak from bottom pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Observed the hoods and vents in the kitchen to have an accumulation of grease and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
The condensate from the bar tap is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
